title: rubus bellardii
intro: Rubus bellardii, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a species of bramble that belongs to the rose family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus bellardii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and is also used in jams, jellies, and other food products due to its sweet and slightly tart flavor.
